executives.name: Chris Woodall
executives.background: Mr. Woodall has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior operational roles at Goldcorp and Barrick Gold.

executives.name: David Ransom
executives.background: Dr. Ransom has over 45 years of experience in the mining industry as a geologist and consultant.

executives.name: Elissa Brown
executives.background: Ms. Brown is a Chartered Accountant with over 20 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors.

executives.name: Sean Harvey
executives.background: Mr. Harvey has over 25 years of experience in the investment banking and mining industries. He has served as Chairman of Victoria Gold since 2007. He was previously President and CEO of Orvana Minerals Corp.
